message:
test(mcp): add policy input and audit decision context tests for MCP tools

Add 8 unit tests covering previously untested MCP tool helper functions:

- Policy input helpers: send_text, workflow_run, reserve_pane,
  release_pane (with and without pane_id) — verify action/actor/surface
  and field propagation
- Event mutation decision context: full field verification with actor_id,
  actor_id omission when None, serialization produces valid JSON

Total mcp_tools tests: 35 (was 27).

Build: --features mcp,subprocess-bridge,asupersync-runtime
All 35 pass (0.10s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
